name: Column
description: Column — US programmable bank and payments infrastructure offering ACH, wire, and real-time payment APIs backed by a national bank charter.

seo.title: Column — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Column: Column — US programmable bank and payments infrastructure offering ACH, wire, and real-time payment APIs backed by a national bank charter.

when_to_use: ACH, wire, and RTP APIs backed by national bank charter for fintechs
Real-time payment (FedNow, RTP) integration for US fintech products
Bank account creation and money movement infrastructure for neobanks
Programmable US banking layer for lending and payment platform builders

review.verdict: Unique bank-as-API play — if you're serious about US rails, Column removes layers others can't.
review.best_for: US fintechs needing direct bank rail access without a sponsor bank
review.not_for: Non-US companies or merchants just wanting card acceptance

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
